MEMORANDUM OF ATTORNEY'S FEES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REED, JR., EDDIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 636 PRECITA AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $9,658.44 RENT, $1,441.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $133.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,232.44, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMNT PURSUANT TO DECLARATION OF PLTF RE NON-COMPLIANCE OF DEFT RE STIP. MONEY JUDGMNT INCLUDES: BACK RENT OF $6449.00; DAMAGES FROM 3-1-96 OF $3209.44 ($30.86 PER DAY) FOR A TOTAL MONEY JUDGMNT OF $9658.44. COSTS & ATNYS FEES PER STIP & DECLARATION.
